message:
fix(node): harden connector subsystems — overflow, ordering, eviction, capabilities

control_channel.rs:
- Saturating add for sequence number increment to prevent overflow at u64::MAX
- New test: sequence_regress_after_max_sequence_does_not_overflow verifies
  that the SequenceRegress error reports expected_min = u64::MAX correctly

lease_conflict.rs:
- Canonicalize lease ID ordering in fork_log_entry hash: sort (lease_a,
  lease_b) so that conflict(A,B) and conflict(B,A) produce identical entry_ids.
  Previously the hash was order-dependent, causing duplicate fork log entries.
- Include resource, overlap_start, overlap_end, and action_id in hash input
  for stronger collision resistance on distinct conflicts
- Fix error propagation in process_conflicts: fork_log_entry errors were
  silently dropped (if let Ok), now properly collected into errors vec

quarantine_store.rs:
- Reorder ingest steps: TTL eviction before duplicate check, so expired entries
  don't block re-ingestion of the same object_id after TTL expires
- Early reject for objects exceeding max_bytes: fail immediately instead of
  evicting healthy entries then failing anyway
- Use saturating_add for byte tracking to prevent overflow

remote_cap.rs:
- Add ConnectivityMode Display impl (connected/local_only)
- New error variant ConnectivityModeDenied for operations rejected based on
  connectivity mode, with Display and error code implementations
- Connectivity mode enforcement in authorize(): LocalOnly mode rejects
  operations that require remote connectivity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
